message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor<<<<<<< LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}
skinparam component {
  BackgroundColor LightSteelBlue
  BorderColor Black
}

actor "ユーザー" as User1
component "ブラウザ" as Browser1
component "web.php" as WebPHP1
component "JissyuController" as JissyuController1

User1 -> Browser1 : 該当ページをリクエスト[/jissyu2]
Browser1 -> WebPHP1 : GET[/jissyu2]
WebPHP1 -> JissyuController1 : @index
JissyuController1 --> Browser1

actor "ユーザー" as User2
component "ブラウザ" as Browser2
component "web.php" as WebPHP2
component "JissyuController" as JissyuController2

@enduml
```
